personas.name: Sophia
personas.description: Sophia is a young professional who has been experiencing stress and anxiety. She is looking for a helpful tool to manage her emotions and improve her mental well-being.
personas.context: Sophia is a busy professional with a demanding job and limited time for self-care.
evidence_reviews: fantastic app truly helpful supporting one work problem find solution
love wysa step invaluable helpful making commitment outlining day first thing morning help wysa gentle encouraging prompt insightful question suggestion

personas.name: Mark
personas.description: Mark is a frustrated user who has experienced technical issues with the app. He is looking for a reliable and user-friendly solution for mental health support.
goals: find a reliable and user-friendly mental health app
personas.context: Mark has had negative experiences with mental health apps in the past and is skeptical about their effectiveness.
evidence_reviews: tried for about half and hour. Would ask questions then disregard all my responses by repeatedly asking me if I wanted to try a grounding or some other technique. I get blown off enough by the living. Don't need ignored by an app. lol. I actually wasn't expecting much from it, just wanted to give it a try out of curiosity. Now I know.

personas.name: Emma
personas.description: Emma is a individual who is seeking a cost-effective solution for mental health support. She is looking for an app that offers value for money and is willing to pay for a premium service.
goals: find a cost-effective mental health solution
personas.context: Emma is on a limited budget and is looking for affordable mental health solutions.
constraints: willing to pay for premium services
evidence_reviews: do not install this app if you are searching for something free because this is paid.

subscription is very expensive and at the end of the day it's a paid therapist and as for the ai pet or something it basically mindfulness I would have paid for it maybe if it was was ai with a bit of intelligence and self care that wasnt overkill but I don't see nothing new that is being offered here I'm sure some intelligent pr team is gonna have very good comeback to this thou

first day impressed challenge watching youtube video
